query:
SELECT id, status, startedAt, completedAt, 
  ROUND((UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000 - completedAt) / 3600000, 1) AS age_hours
FROM pipelineRun 
ORDER BY startedAt DESC 
LIMIT 5;
